ground_truth.title: Monday Night Meditation Subscription — Meryl Arnett -  Atlanta Meditation teacher
ground_truth.main_content: Monday Night Meditation Subscription - $39.00 every month. Join me each week for a live, virtual Monday night meditation class. Membership fee auto-renews each month. Cancel any time. Membership includes: Access to all live, virtual classes; Q&A time included in each class; Exclusive monthly Community Discussion sessions; Connection to an engaged and supportive community of meditators. Members receive free access to select bonus experiences not offered on the podcast. Save 10% on all workshops, retreats and special programming.
